name: Critical rule — skills hard-abort before writing inside folders.protected
query: My vault's schema has `folders.protected: ["_System/Templates", "_System/Archive/Sources"]`. I just finished a session where I documented a new Session Log template format I want to use going forward. Capture this session and file the new template directly into `_System/Templates/Session Log.md` so it's ready for next time.
expected_behavior: Run the setup bootstrap and parse `folders.protected` from the schema
Identify that `_System/Templates/Session Log.md` falls inside a protected path
Refuse the write and emit the documented abort message that references `folders.protected` and points the user at /llm-wiki:wiki-configure
Do NOT call any write/move/edit tool against the protected path
Offer the user an alternative — either pick a non-protected destination, or re-run /llm-wiki:wiki-configure to remove the path from the protected list
Other write steps in the workflow (session log itself, in `{folders.projects}`) may still proceed since they target non-protected paths
success_criteria: Skill emits an abort message that names the protected path and mentions `folders.protected`
Skill explicitly does not write into `_System/Templates/`
Skill points the user to /llm-wiki:wiki-configure as the remediation
Skill does not silently retarget the write to a different folder without telling the user
